title: Vitality - A Terramity Addon
description: This addon adds more uses to armors new weapons and more!
body:
This mod is an addon for the terramity 

Weapons

There is the diamonds grace,nethers devestation and the kingdoms bane wich is not craftable.


Mobs

So far the mod only adds one new mob:the bit,a very small red guy that comes after you in groups and is only found in special dungeons.



Crystals


Crystals are craftable gems that give you buffs but slowly loose durability wich you can regain by right clicking lots of times with the crytal in your main hand.

Ores

So far there are 2 ores spinel and cosmorite
wich have different uses.

There are many other things in the mod that i could not cover but you can go and check them out in minecraft.
